description: News and reference site. Content is for reading; bulk retrieval is rate limited and a licensed feed exists for high-volume use.

limits.description: 300 page fetches per IP per hour. Enough for reading; not enough for site-wide scraping.
Minimum 2 seconds between successive fetches from the same IP.

pages.note: For bulk or commercial use, request the licensed content feed: https://example.com/licensing
